info.title: Admin API
info.description: Admin endpoints for managing firmware depots, channels, and gears.

tags.name: Resources
tags.description: Declarative admin resource get, put, and delete operations

post.description: Create or update a declarative admin resource described by apiVersion, kind, metadata, and spec.

501.description: Apply is defined but not implemented

get.description: Get a named declarative admin resource by kind and name.

501.description: Resource get is defined but not implemented

put.summary: Create or update an admin resource
put.description: Create or update a named declarative admin resource. The request body's kind and metadata.name must match the path parameters.

501.description: Resource put is defined but not implemented

delete.description: Delete a named declarative admin resource by kind and name. ResourceList and resources without delete semantics are rejected.

put.summary: Create or update depot info (file manifest)
Roll back stable channel to the rollback snapshot
Upload a firmware release tarball for a channel
Create or update a MiniMax tenant

post.summary: Sync voices from a MiniMax tenant into the global voice catalog

put.summary: Create or update a Volcengine tenant

post.summary: Sync voices from a Volcengine tenant into the global voice catalog

409.description: Voice cannot be modified because source is sync

put.summary: Create or update a workspace template

get.summary: Resolve gear public key by serial number
Resolve gear public key by IMEI
List gears by firmware depot and channel

post.summary: Approve a gear with a given role
Refresh gear info from connected device

description.example: primary MiniMax tenant for CN voices
primary Volcengine tenant for Doubao voices

provider_data.description: Provider-specific debug data keyed by provider kind.

cursor.name: cursor
cursor.description: Opaque cursor returned by the previous list response

limit.name: limit
limit.description: Maximum number of items to return. Omitted or non-positive values use the default page size; values above 200 are clamped.

voiceProviderName.name: providerName
voiceProviderName.description: Filter voices by provider instance name
